input: Text prompt: a single small blue and white porcelain vase
geometry_quality: Medium: simple vase geometry is more stable than animal prompts, but SDS may still introduce surface artifacts
texture_quality: Medium: blue-white porcelain style is visible in preview and turntable render
estimated_time: About 32 minutes on one NVIDIA H200 for 10000 steps
advantages: No physical object required; prompt controls category, material, and style
limitations: Geometry and texture are less reliable than real multi-view reconstruction and require visual inspection

input: Single segmented image: guitar with transparent background
geometry_quality: Medium-high on visible side and weaker on occluded side
texture_quality: Medium-high on visible side with possible stretching on generated views
estimated_time: About 3 minutes for 600 optimization steps on one NVIDIA H200 after model weights are ready
advantages: Low input cost and preserves image identity
limitations: Invisible sides rely on priors and may contain hallucinated details
